de.uka.ilkd.key.control

Interface RuleCompletionHandler

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl, ConsoleUserInterfaceControl, WindowUserInterfaceControl

    public interface RuleCompletionHandler
    Instances of this class are used by an AbstractProofControl to complete a Rule completion.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void completeAndApplyTacletMatch(TacletInstantiationModel[] models, Goal goal)
      called to complete and apply a taclet instantiations
      IBuiltInRuleApp completeBuiltInRuleApp(IBuiltInRuleApp app, Goal goal, boolean forced)
      completes rule applications of built in rules

    • Method Detail

      • completeAndApplyTacletMatch

        void completeAndApplyTacletMatch(TacletInstantiationModel[] models,
                                 Goal goal)
        called to complete and apply a taclet instantiations
        Parameters:
        models - the partial models with all different possible instantiations found automatically
        goal - the Goal where to apply

      • completeBuiltInRuleApp

        IBuiltInRuleApp completeBuiltInRuleApp(IBuiltInRuleApp app,
                                       Goal goal,
                                       boolean forced)
        completes rule applications of built in rules
        Parameters:
        app - the DefaultBuiltInRuleApp to be completed
        goal - the Goal where the app will later be applied to
        forced - a boolean indicating if the rule should be applied without any additional interaction from the user provided that the application object can be made complete automatically
        Returns:
        a complete app or null if no completion was possible
